TestCase.name: testCountStarAggregateWithFilter
TestCase.Resource: select count(*) from emp where deptno = 10
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[COUNT()]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[COUNT($0)]) LogicalProject($f0=[CASE(=($7, 10), 1, null:INTEGER)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testMultiAggregatesWithFilter
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal), min(sal), max(sal), count(*) from emp where deptno = 10
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($5)], EXPR$1=[MIN($5)], EXPR$2=[MAX($5)], EXPR$3=[COUNT()]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0)], EXPR$1=[MIN($0)], EXPR$2=[MAX($0)], EXPR$3=[COUNT($1)]) LogicalProject($f0=[CASE(=($7, 10), $5, null:INTEGER)], $f1=[CASE(=($7, 10), 1, null:INTEGER)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testNullAwareAggregateWithFilter
TestCase.Resource: select null_aware_sum(sal) from emp where deptno = 10
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[NULL_AWARE_SUM($5)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSumAggregateWithEmptyGroupByAndFilter
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) from emp where deptno = 10 group by ()
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($5)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0)]) LogicalProject($f0=[CASE(=($7, 10), $5, null:INTEGER)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSumAggregateWithEmptyGroupingSetsAndFilter
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) from emp where deptno = 10 group by grouping sets (())
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($5)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0)]) LogicalProject($f0=[CASE(=($7, 10), $5, null:INTEGER)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSumAggregateWithFilter
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) from emp where deptno = 10
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($5)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0)]) LogicalProject($f0=[CASE(=($7, 10), $5, null:INTEGER)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSumAggregateWithGroupByOnColumnAndFilter
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) from emp where deptno = 10 group by job
LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$1]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{2}], EXPR$0=[SUM($5)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSumAggregateWithGroupingSetsAndFilter
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) from emp where deptno = 10 group by grouping sets ((job), (ename))

LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$2]) LogicalProject(JOB=[$1], ENAME=[$0], EXPR$0=[$2]) LogicalAggregate(group=[{1, 2}], groups=[[{1}, {2}]], EXPR$0=[SUM($5)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
